message:
fix(db,search,cli,tools,guard,share): SQLite WAL sidecar health probes, NFC normalization, case-insensitive agents, and multi-crate bug fixes

SQLite health checks now detect schema corruption hidden in active WAL
sidecars by running a canonical sqlite3 probe alongside the FrankenSQLite
connection check. The "database schema is corrupt" error message is now
recognized as a corruption signal. Both pool.rs and the CLI doctor
replicate this dual-probe approach with full test coverage.

Canonical text normalization (search_canonical, canonical.rs) now uses the
unicode-normalization crate for proper NFC composition instead of the
previous ASCII-only approximation. The TitleOnly canonicalization policy
now also redacts secrets, closing a gap where titles containing API keys
or JWTs were passed through unredacted.

Agent registration and listing queries use COLLATE NOCASE to prevent
duplicate agent rows caused by case-only name differences. list_agents
deduplicates via ROW_NUMBER partitioned by case-folded name.

Guard path conflict checking skips empty normalized patterns and paths to
avoid false-positive reservation conflicts on degenerate inputs like "./"
or "/".

Tools fixes: messaging push_recipient no longer duplicates resolved names
when the same agent is already in the recipient list; contact list_contacts
gracefully handles agent-name resolution failures with logged warnings
instead of silently dropping entries; force_release_file_reservation
computes its timestamp only after the release succeeds; scrub_snapshot
deletes file_reservation_releases before file_reservations to respect FK
constraints and generates a unique pseudonym_salt instead of reusing the
preset name.

Share/crypto: bundle verify now requires at least one SRI file to have been
checked for sri_valid to be true; age decryption captures stderr for
actionable error messages.

Flake triage env capture narrows the "CI" prefix to "CI=" and "CI_" to
avoid leaking unrelated env vars starting with those letters.

Includes rustfmt line-length normalization across all touched files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4738,6 +4738,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "thiserror",
  "tokenizers",
  "tracing",
+ "unicode-normalization",
  "wide",
 ]
 
@@ -4782,6 +4783,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "thiserror",
  "tokenizers",
  "tracing",
+ "unicode-normalization",
  "wide",
 ]

@@ -77,6 +77,7 @@ include_dir = "0.7.4"
 minijinja = "2.15.1"
 ammonia = "4.1.2"
 regex = "1"
+unicode-normalization = "0.1"
 similar = "2"
 git2 = { version = "0.20", features = ["vendored-libgit2"] }
 glob = "0.3.3"

@@ -441,7 +441,9 @@ pub fn capture_env_snapshot() -> BTreeMap<String, String> {
         "CIRCUIT_",
         "RUST_",
         "CARGO_",
-        "CI",
+        "CI=",
+        "CI_",
+        "CIRCLECI",
         "GITHUB_",
         "AM_",
         "WORKTREES_",

@@ -17,6 +17,7 @@ chrono.workspace = true
 thiserror.workspace = true
 tracing.workspace = true
 regex.workspace = true
+unicode-normalization.workspace = true
 sha2.workspace = true
 hex.workspace = true

@@ -16,6 +16,7 @@ chrono.workspace = true
 sha2.workspace = true
 hex.workspace = true
 regex.workspace = true
+unicode-normalization.workspace = true
 tracing.workspace = true
 
 # Core types (config, models)
